heading_content_part: About Meet24 and information we collect.We collect personal profile and location information on our members.                                        When you download and install the Application, you agree to share your location with                                        Meet24                                        on a continuous and periodic basis. Your location may be transmitted off of your mobile device                                        when the Application is closed.
